languages.text: [Сложить на груди аквилу] "Конечно, Нунциус. В сердце истинно верующего есть место лишь для Бога-Императора".
[Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: [Сложить на груди аквилу] "Конечно, Нунциус. В сердце истинно верующего есть место лишь для Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."
[Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."
[Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."

languages.text: [Hacer el signo del Aquila] «Por supuesto, Nuncius. Un verdadero creyente solo tiene sitio para el Dios Emperador en su corazón».
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: [Hacer el signo del Aquila] «Por supuesto, Nuncius. Un verdadero creyente solo tiene sitio para el Dios Emperador en su corazón».

languages.text: 【做出双头鹰手势】“那是自然，努恩修斯。一个真正的信徒，心里只容得下神皇。”
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 【做出双头鹰手势】“那是自然，努恩修斯。一个真正的信徒，心里只容得下神皇。”

languages.text: [Effectuer le signe de l'Aquila] « Bien sûr, Nuncius. Le cœur entier des fidèles est dévoué à l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: [Effectuer le signe de l'Aquila] « Bien sûr, Nuncius. Le cœur entier des fidèles est dévoué à l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: [Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yap] "Elbette Nuncius. Gerçek bir inananın kalbinde sadece Tanrı İmparator'a yer vardır."
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: [Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yap] "Elbette Nuncius. Gerçek bir inananın kalbinde sadece Tanrı İmparator'a yer vardır."

languages.text: ［アクィラの印を切る］「もちろんだ、ヌンキウス。真の信者の心には、神帝陛下のための場所しかない」
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: ［アクィラの印を切る］「もちろんだ、ヌンキウス。真の信者の心には、神帝陛下のための場所しかない」

languages.text: [Das Zeichen des Adlers machen] "Natürlich, Nuncius. Ein wahrer Gläubiger hat in seinem Herzen nur Platz für den Gottimperator."
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila] "Of course, Nuncius. A true believer only has room in their heart for the God-Emperor."
